hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(kubectl|helm).*(apply|delete|patch|create|edit).*-n[ =](gptoss|tkt-|template-)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"FORBIDDEN: Template deployment namespaces (gptoss*, tkt-*, template-*) must only be modified via the thinkube-control UI. See CLAUDE.md."}'; exit 0; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git clone.*gitea\.cmxela\.com'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"FORBIDDEN: Cloning from Gitea triggers template rebuilds. See CLAUDE.md."}'; exit 0; fi

input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""))'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '^/tmp/thinkube-installer'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not edit files in /tmp/thinkube-installer — it is an installer clone. Edit the source repo at /home/thinkube/thinkube-platform/core/thinkube/ instead."}'; exit 0; fi; if [ "${path#/home/thinkube/thinkube-control/}" != "$path" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not edit /home/thinkube/thinkube-control/ directly — it is synced by Copier and will be overwritten. Edit /home/thinkube/thinkube-platform/core/thinkube-control/ instead."}'; exit 0; fi
